name: Italian Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the cheeses together.
2. Add egg yolks, sugar, cognac, and vanilla to the creamed cheese mixture.
3. Pour the batter into prepared pie crusts.
4. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Makes 2 pies.
Note: Amaretto, frangelico, or other liquors may be substituted for the cognac. For a plain cheesecake, use only vanilla. Chopped pecans or other nuts may be added.
